title: Every Outfit Kendall Jenner Wears in a Week | 7 Days, 7 Looks | Vogue India
description:
In this episode of '7 Days, 7 Looks', Kendall Jenner talks us through a week of her favourite outfits, that suit her personal style (and preferences), for all occasions whatever the day of the week.

Watch what Jenner would wear when she has to run a few errands, what she chooses when she has a full day of business meetings, which look meets all the requirements for fashion week, and what she wears almost daily when she hits the gym. Jenner gives us plenty of style inspiration with her comfort
